# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-serviceentry
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  gateways:
    - mesh-egress-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.thirdparty.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-serviceentry
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.externaldb.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgresql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.externaldb.com
  gateways:
    - mesh-egress-gateway
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: db.externaldb.com
            port:
              number: 5432

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: mesh-egress-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: egressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 80
        name: http
        protocol: HTTP
      hosts:
        - "*"
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: https
        protocol: HTTPS
      tls:
        mode: SIMPLE
        serverCertificate: /etc/istio/egressgateway-certs/tls.crt
        privateKey: /etc/istio/egressgateway-certs/tls.key
      hosts:
        - "*"
